abilities.description: Make an asteroid fall onto a tile within your line of sight. The asteroid deals damage and leaves a rock.Upgraded: Make an asteroid fall onto a tile within your line of sight. The asteroid deals damage, bruises and leaves a boulder.

translation.ru_description: Обрушьте астероид на видимую клетку. Урон и создание камня.

abilities.description: Deal damage to a unit in your line of sight, then increase this spell's damage by 1 for the rest of the battle.Upgraded: Deal damage to a unit in your line of sight, then increase this spell's damage by 1 for the rest of the battle. (This spell costs less.)

translation.ru_description: Урон видимому юниту. Урон этого заклинания растет на 1 до конца битвы.
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
Урон видимому юниту. Урон этого заклинания растет на 1 до конца битвы.
[s:.7](Это заклинание стоит дешевле.)[/s]

abilities.description: Teleport to the last tile you targeted with an ability if it's empty.Upgraded: Teleport to the last tile you targeted with an ability. Displace and damage any units on that tile.

translation.ru_description: Телепорт на последнюю клетку, на которую вы использовали способность. (Если Клетка Свободна).
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Телепорт на последнюю клетку, на которую вы использовали способность. Сместите и нанесите Урон юниту на этой клетке.
translation.en_description: Teleport to the last tile you targeted with an ability if it's empty.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Teleport to the last tile you targeted with an ability. Displace and damage any units on that tile.

abilities.description: Deal damage with Knockback 4 and Chain Knockback in a cone.Upgraded: Deal damage with Knockback 4, Chain Knockback and inflict Bruise 1 in a cone.

translation.ru_description: Урон, Отбрасывание 4 и Цепное отбрасывание в конусе.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Урон, Отбрасывание 4, Цепное отбрасывание и Ушиб 1 в конусе.
translation.en_description: Deal damage with Knockback 4 and Chain Knockback in a cone.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Deal damage with Knockback 4, Chain Knockback and inflict Bruise 1 in a cone.

abilities.description: Inflict Slow 1 on a unit within your line of sight. If you cast this from full mana, instead inflict Immobilize 1 and deal 6 damage.Upgraded: Inflict Slow 1 on each unit in an area around a tile within your line of sight. If you cast this from full mana, instead inflict Immobilize 1 and deal 6 damage.

translation.ru_description: Замедление 1 видимому юниту. При полной мане: вместо этого Обездвиживание 1 и 6 урона.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Замедление 1 в видимой области. При полной мане: Обездвиживание 1 и 6 урона.
translation.en_description: Inflict Slow 1 on a unit within your line of sight. If you cast this from full mana, instead inflict Immobilize 1 and deal 6 damage.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Inflict Slow 1 on each unit in an area around a tile within your line of sight. If you cast this from full mana, instead inflict Immobilize 1 and deal 6 damage.

abilities.description: Teleport in a straight line into a unit within your line of sight. Deal damage and displace it.Upgraded: Teleport into a unit within your line of sight. Deal damage and displace it.

translation.ru_description: Телепортируйтесь по прямой ПРЯМО В видимого юнита. Урон и смещение.

translation.en_upgraded_description: Teleport into a unit within your line of sight. Deal damage and displace it.

abilities.description: Deal damage to and inflict Blind on every unit within your line of sight.Upgraded: Deal damage to and inflict Blind on every unit within your line of sight, excluding your allies.
